overview: Bharat Netra is India's independent truth network — a national-grade platform delivering verified news, live video, and public intelligence with zero propaganda and complete transparency. Every article is fact-checked, bias-scored, and clearly classified as Fact, Opinion, or Unverified.
features: Verified news feed with Truth Score (0–100), Bias Indicator, and Source Reliability per article
Propaganda detection: emotional manipulation, selective facts, fear-based language, ideological pushing
Live video section with LIVE/UPCOMING/ENDED stream status
Intelligence Dashboard with bias distribution, propaganda alert count, and verification stats
Dark navy + saffron national branding — No Godi. No Chatukar. Only Truth.
